completed.command: create scene name=Game first=true
create object name=Player type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=32 height=32 scene=Game
create object name=Bullet type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#FFD700 width=12 height=6 scene=Game
create object name=Enemy type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#DC3232 width=28 height=28 scene=Game
create object name=PowerUp type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#2ECC71 width=16 height=16 scene=Game
create object name=HudScore type=Text size=20 scene=Game
create object name=HudWave type=Text size=20 scene=Game
set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
set variable name=Wave value=1 type=Number scope=global
set variable name=PlayerHealth value=3 type=Number scope=global
place object=Player at=100,300 scene=Game
place object=HudScore at=16,16 scene=Game
place object=HudWave at=16,44 scene=Game
on start -> Score=0, Wave=1, PlayerHealth=3 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on start -> Score=0, Wave=1, PlayerHealth=3

completed.command: on start -> text HudScore Score scene=Game
completed.message: event: on start -> text HudScore Score

completed.command: on start -> text HudWave Wave scene=Game
completed.message: event: on start -> text HudWave Wave

completed.command: on key ArrowUp held -> move Player y=-4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowUp held -> move Player y=-4

completed.command: on key ArrowDown held -> move Player y=+4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowDown held -> move Player y=+4

completed.command: on key ArrowLeft held -> move Player x=-4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowLeft held -> move Player x=-4

completed.command: on key ArrowRight held -> move Player x=+4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowRight held -> move Player x=+4

completed.command: on key Space -> spawn Bullet at 100 300 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key Space -> spawn Bullet at 100 300

completed.command: on collision Bullet Enemy -> destroy Bullet, destroy Enemy, score+10 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Bullet Enemy -> destroy Bullet, destr

completed.command: on collision Player PowerUp -> destroy PowerUp, variable PlayerHealth = 3 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Player PowerUp -> destroy PowerUp, va

completed.command: on collision Player Enemy -> restart scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Player Enemy -> restart

completed.command: every 2s -> spawn Enemy at 780 100 scene=Game
every 2s -> spawn Enemy at 780 250 scene=Game
every 3s -> spawn Enemy at 780 400 scene=Game
every 15s -> spawn PowerUp at 400 300 scene=Game
